messages.text: Socks are down
Thank you Justin Halladay
Maintenance is checking the cooler
We adjusted the mixing water to 83.4
Maintenance and QA checked and everything was fine
The shipment of chocolate has begun.
It stops at Product Refill.
The shipment of chocolate has begun.
An adjustment is made to the mixing water at 11:04 AM. The dispatch of chocolate continues.
We change the display version from 2 to 3
Chocolate shipments have been halted, pending a new adjustment.
The shipment of chocolate has begun.
Good Morning, NEW WO for Molding 1, change version Display Todos
We stopped sending chocolate to the hopper. Slope is at 1.2
Depositing again
The line has paused due to the temper, it is currently at 1.2. The operator will perform an adjustment.
We went down .2 on mixing water, now at 81.6. The tapping was performed at SoS
Current settings. Robert Villarreal do you have any suggestions if this doesn’t work?
C6 and metal detector belts are running well.
Our last one was .9 we are running again and will continue to monitor
We got another 1.2
Line is paused
We deposited again.
1.2 pausing again
I’ll try that now
It might help if you lower the water jacket to 93.0 if the buffer tank temp is in the green but other than that and the regular adjustment of mixing water you might need a reheat.
We’re doing another temper test now
1.1 again we are doing a remelt
Tempermeter has been moved
Remelt completed loaded the crunch recipe
Doing capture test first
Temper is good we’re going to start
Capture test
Nice job Nathan & Imperial
Not yet it just jumped up to 1.5 at 18:02
Rice Inspection

Broadly speaking, operations have remained stable across the various areas evaluated. The checks conducted regarding weight, organoleptic properties, packaging, pallet assembly, and ingredients all fall within established parameters, thereby meeting the required standards.
However, a deviation persists within the tempering process. Since the commencement of the evaluation, it has been observed that the chocolate temperature fails to remain within the specified ranges. A reheating procedure was performed; yet, despite continuous adjustments and inspections, the issue persists, showing no evidence of adequate stability in the temper.
Monitoring remains ongoing in order to maintain control and prevent any potential adverse impacts on the quality and consistency of the final product.
We’re currently at a 1.4 slope with mixing water at 83.3
Robert Villarreal you have any other ideas? I’ve tapped it already
C6 and metal detector belts are running well.
We got good temper doing one more to ensure
Good temper we’re going to start depositing
Hose staying empty
Line paused for high temper
Depositing

Thank you Nathan Gevenois

Also remember that it’s 8 hour clean for 3rd shift on ML1
Yes I told them to stop depositing at 10:05 should I have them stop earlier given the problems we have had?
No sir. You have a good plan
Itzel please have your team break down the totes when they are finished with them
Level 2 clean in process
I coached my team to check the sweco hose   while checking the temper.
PTL shutdown checklist
Started assemble the belts
Level 2 clean completed
<attachment id="971d366d-dc7a-47e4-a67c-35c6a7d1d2e8"></attachment>
Kavin Ayala Do we have a replacement rubber? It’s in the scraper area
Damaged belt on TG5 causes line to stop a bit when running. I’ll ask maintenance, if we have a spare after done assembling discharge conveyor.
Level 2 clean is complete
Belt has been replaced
As of now we have not received BET pouches Sunny Jagtiani Curt Willis

Thank you Jazmin Vazquez

I just called and talked to Sunny Jagtiani.  He is making calls now.

Please let warehouse know that if they arrive to make everyone aware
Curt Willis Jazmin Vazquez Francisco Gudino Torres - We are working on getting eyes on the shipment. Stay tuned, I will report back and let you know the status

The truck has been out at L1 7:10 AM. I’m getting pictures for proof.

Curt Willis Jazmin Vazquez Francisco Gudino Torres
Jazmin Vazquez can you go talk to the warehouse group please
Curt Willis Jazmin Vazquez is it unloaded yet?
We got them, the truck just arrived like 15min ago.
4 pallets and a partial.

Thank you Jazmin Vazquez

Has it been received?
No, Marcos is working on it now.
Ok.  Please post when they have been received

He’s having issues with the PO 

Sunny Jagtiani can you help? That PO is not working.
Jazmin Vazquez just talked to Sunny Jagtiani he will be reaching out
Jazmin Vazquez - could you give me our part number? I can’t see that
Jazmin Vazquez - do you know how to search for PO’s like this?
We got it, thank you, Sunny! Pouches have now been received.

perfect!

In the future, please share this attachment and note. It comes in handy
Everything Covered in plastic.. if they dont come this time we need to charge them! Curt Willis

Charity Young,Curt Willis, Chad Stone. Tunnel 2 is empty of product and we’ve covered the tunnel and the bottomer in the area where we are moving the tent. We are ready to move the tent when QA arrives.
QA is here, we are going to start removing the tent. Curt Willis

Awesome. 

Are we throwing the mop heads away once we finish

Tent is moved, 2 new tarps are up on the east and west side where the tent was and cones are in place. 

We are starting to mop the area once we mop twice QA will take swabs and we will uncover the line and start running. Curt Willis, Chad Stone
We also have foot sprayers on both sides of the coned off area.
Correct. We are also throwing the broom head away we used to sweep the area.
The line has started running again
The return conveyor has been cleaned.

This is the current temperature on the decorator, would you like us to drop to 90?

Curt Willis Dakota Adair
Yes, it can drop to 90 now 👍
Line speed raised to 70
I can do

While discussing plans with my lead, they informed me we should not turn the belt washer on as we're running product because the belt stays a little wet and gets the pecans wet. We will run it for thirty minutes after we have stopped
Let’s talk when I get there.
Shift 3
I cannot set up the BET pouches on the matrixes with them locked out
I have searched all the red boxes and found 2 loose keys, but they are not correct.
After some searching I found them in curts office. Maybe I missed a message about them on here... but matrixes are being set up for BET pouches
The matrixes are all locked out. I passed on the cleaning of the bottom of the matrixes along with the keys and paperwork on wednesday to you Victor Romero Sr. Do you have the keys put somewhere?
Decorator installed and mini temper unit plugged in. Just needs to be filled and hoses hooked up Monday morning Victor Romero Sr.
Matrixes set up for better goods
The salt hapman is in place. But the depositor still needs to be filled with salt
On Charity Young request. The drains where the tent was have been cleaned
The belt washer on tunnel 3 was ran for app. An hour. The belt washer on tunnel 2 for 45 min

A note about the belt washer on a lvl 1 clean. It doesn't serve us to use it because unless all rollers and scrapers are completely cleaned with water the belt gets wet and picks up the residue off of sed scrapers and rollers

Thank you! Joseph Scott after you do the clean on your shift tonight and fill out the paper work, will you leave the paperwork on my desk so we can complete it Monday morning.
I talked with Charity Young this morning, she is going to have a QA tech in Monday morning at 5am to do swabs before we start cleaning. Curt Willis,Chad Stone.

Joseph Scott Jody Howse

Tonight we will  clean S2 and S3 as a level 1

S2
Level 1. Remove all product and debris by dry cleaning only.  No rinse, soap or sanitizer.  The only wet wash will be the belt washers on Tunnel 2 and Tunnel 3

S3. 
Level 1.  Remove all product and debris by dry cleaning only.  No rinse, soap or sanitize.  Also no using of the belt washers. 

Charity Young Will be in to show you new Level 1 paperwork 




We also had vent cleaning this weekend.  The following needs covered 

All of S3 from the kitchen “including kettles and tote saddles” to the wall by the enrober 

S2 kitchen “kettles and tote saddles” S2 conbar, and tunnel 1

Manager desk area

Thank you

Quality will be taking post clean: 
S2 ATP and APC sponges 
S3 ATP

Same ATP & APC sponges Mon morning.

No. We are just doing post clean & Monday this time.
